name: Mercury
description: The smallest and innermost planet in the Solar System.

name: Venus
description: The second planet from the Sun and the hottest planet in our solar system.

name: Earth
description: Our home planet and the only known planet to support life.

name: Mars
description: A cold, desert-like world that is often called the Red Planet.

name: Jupiter
description: The largest planet in our solar system, more than twice as massive as all the other planets combined.

name: Saturn
description: Known for its beautiful and extensive ring system.

name: Uranus
description: An ice giant with a blue-green color due to methane in its atmosphere.

name: Neptune
description: The most distant major planet from the Sun, dark, cold, and whipped by supersonic winds.
